{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Amorentus
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Amorentus]] is a world where the [[Reaper]] struck.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
